touches.ai_summary: Outbound LinkedIn message to Tyler O'Connor introducing our onboarding automation platform. Tyler responded positively and expressed interest in learning more about how we could help CoreOps streamline their property onboarding process.

questions_asked.question: How does your platform differ from what we're currently evaluating with Fireflies?
questions_asked.answer: Our platform is purpose-built for onboarding automation workflows, not just meeting transcription. We offer unlimited automation capabilities that can orchestrate your entire onboarding process end-to-end.

next_steps: Schedule qualification call to discuss CoreOps' current onboarding challenges

touches.ai_summary: Initial qualification call with Tyler O'Connor. Discussed CoreOps' current onboarding pain points for new property clients. Tyler mentioned they're manually handling a lot of data entry and document collection. He's evaluating multiple solutions including Fireflies.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the urgency to solve this now?
questions_asked.answer: We're scaling rapidly and our sales team is spending 40% of their time on onboarding tasks instead of selling.

questions_asked.question: What's your pricing structure look like?
questions_asked.answer: We have flexible pricing based on seats and automation volume. Let's dig into your specific needs first so I can show you the right fit.

next_steps: Tyler to share current onboarding workflow documentation

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up qualification call with Tyler. Reviewed CoreOps' onboarding workflow in detail. They're currently using a mix of spreadsheets, email, and manual handoffs. Tyler shared that Fireflies is primarily being considered for meeting notes, but they need something more comprehensive. Discussed team size (16 users across sales and ops).

questions_asked.question: Who else is involved in evaluating this solution?
questions_asked.answer: Our COO Levi Desai will need to sign off, and Lisa Mensah from RevOps will be a primary user.

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing CRM and property management systems?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have pre-built connectors for most major CRMs and can build custom integrations for your property management stack.

objections: We're concerned about implementation time - we need something that can go live quickly
next_steps: Schedule discovery call to map specific automation workflows

touches.ai_summary: Third qualification call with Tyler. Addressed his implementation timeline concerns - confirmed we can get them live within 3 weeks. Tyler expressed strong interest in the unlimited automation tier. Discussed how this differs from Fireflies' more limited scope.

questions_asked.question: What does 'unlimited automation' actually mean in practice?
questions_asked.answer: No caps on the number of workflows, actions, or records processed. You can automate your entire onboarding lifecycle without worrying about hitting usage limits.

next_steps: Tyler to introduce Lisa Mensah for technical discussion

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Tyler summarizing qualification discussions and sharing discovery call agenda. Included case study from similar PropTech company that reduced onboarding time by 60%. Tyler confirmed availability for discovery call and copied Lisa Mensah.
next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for next week

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Tyler O'Connor. Deep dive into CoreOps' onboarding workflow across 3 property types. Mapped out 12 distinct automation opportunities from initial client signup through go-live. Tyler shared detailed pain points around document collection, data validation, and handoffs between sales and operations. Confirmed 16 users across sales (8), operations (6), and RevOps (2).

questions_asked.question: What's the current time-to-onboard for a new property client?
questions_asked.answer: Anywhere from 2-4 weeks depending on complexity. We want to get that down to under a week.

questions_asked.question: What happens if you don't solve this in the next quarter?
questions_asked.answer: We'll continue losing deals to faster competitors and our ops team will burn out. This is a top priority for Levi.

questions_asked.question: How long does typical implementation take?
questions_asked.answer: 2-3 weeks for core workflows, with ongoing optimization. We provide dedicated implementation support.

next_steps: Schedule technical evaluation with Lisa Mensah
Tyler to get Levi's calendar for exec alignment

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up call with Tyler to clarify a few workflow details from discovery. Discussed data security requirements and compliance needs for property data. Tyler mentioned budget approval process - needs to stay under $15K ACV to avoid additional executive review.

questions_asked.question: What's your standard contract length?
questions_asked.answer: We typically do annual contracts with option to expand seats mid-year.

next_steps: Prepare pricing for 16 seats under $15K threshold

touches.ai_summary: Email to Tyler with security documentation and SOC 2 certification. Also shared preliminary pricing framework and confirmed technical evaluation scheduled with Lisa Mensah for next week.
Pre-demo email to Tyler with technical evaluation agenda and demo environment access. Included specific workflow examples based on CoreOps' use cases. Tyler confirmed Lisa and he would both attend.

Introduction email to Lisa Mensah with technical evaluation prep materials. Lisa responded with specific questions about data mapping and API documentation. Positive engagement from end user perspective.

questions_asked.question: Can we test the API before committing?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely - we'll provide sandbox access during the evaluation period.

touches.ai_summary: 60-minute technical evaluation with Tyler O'Connor and Lisa Mensah. Walked through live demo of 5 key onboarding automation workflows. Lisa tested the platform hands-on and validated integrations with their CRM. Strong positive feedback on ease of use and unlimited automation capabilities. Tyler noted this is significantly more comprehensive than Fireflies. Lisa raised questions about data migration from current systems.

questions_asked.question: What kind of support do we get during implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Dedicated CSM for first 90 days, plus ongoing technical support. We'll do hands-on training for all 16 users.

questions_asked.question: How do we handle data migration from our existing spreadsheets?
questions_asked.answer: We provide migration templates and can do bulk imports. Typically takes 3-5 days with our support.

questions_asked.question: Is there anything that would prevent you from moving forward?
questions_asked.answer: Just need to align on pricing with Levi and make sure we're getting the right ROI.

objections: Need to make sure pricing fits our budget - we're evaluating Fireflies which is cheaper but less feature-rich
next_steps: Tyler to schedule exec meeting with Levi

touches.ai_summary: Email to Tyler with formal proposal for 16 seats at $17,400 ACV (unlimited automation tier). Included ROI calculator showing 200+ hours saved monthly. Tyler responded that pricing is above their $15K target and asked if there's flexibility.

questions_asked.question: Is there any room to work with us on pricing to get closer to $15K?
questions_asked.answer: Let me discuss with my team. Can you help me understand the $15K threshold?

touches.ai_summary: Executive alignment call with Levi Desai (COO) and Tyler. Levi expressed strong support for solving the onboarding problem - confirmed it's blocking their growth plans. Discussed business impact and ROI. Levi asked about pricing and mentioned they need to be mindful of budget. He's supportive but needs to see compelling ROI to justify cost.

questions_asked.question: What results have similar PropTech companies seen?
questions_asked.answer: Our PropTech customers typically see 50-70% reduction in onboarding time and redeploy 30-40% of ops capacity to higher-value work.

questions_asked.question: What would success look like for you in 6 months?
questions_asked.answer: Onboarding time under 1 week, zero manual data entry, and our sales team focused on selling not admin work.

next_steps: Tyler and Levi to review internally

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Tyler. Walked through revised pricing with 20% discount to $13,920 to fit budget. Tyler appreciated the movement but mentioned Levi is still comparing to Fireflies which is significantly cheaper. Discussed value differentiation - unlimited automation vs. basic transcription.

questions_asked.question: Can we do a shorter term to start - maybe 6 months?
questions_asked.answer: Our platform is priced for annual commitments given implementation investment, but we could discuss quarterly business reviews to ensure you're hitting ROI targets.

questions_asked.question: Is Fireflies able to deliver on the automation workflows Lisa validated?
questions_asked.answer: No, it would only handle meeting notes. We'd still need to build custom automation on top, which defeats the purpose.

objections: Levi is pushing back on pricing compared to Fireflies - need to make sure the premium is justified
next_steps: Tyler to present revised proposal to Levi

touches.ai_summary: Scheduled proposal call with Tyler - meeting was rescheduled by Tyler due to internal budget meeting conflict. Brief discussion confirmed they're still working through pricing internally and comparing options.
next_steps: Tyler to update on budget discussion outcome

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Levi Desai and Tyler. Levi stated clearly that he sees the value but needs pricing closer to $11-12K to justify versus Fireflies plus internal development. Discussed long-term strategic value and platform capabilities. Levi mentioned if we can get to $11K, he's ready to move forward. Asked about implementation timeline if they sign this month.

questions_asked.question: If we sign by end of month, when could we be live?
questions_asked.answer: We could start implementation within 5 business days and have core workflows live within 3 weeks.

questions_asked.question: At $11K, would you be ready to commit?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, that would work within our budget and the ROI case is clear at that price point.

objections: The price delta between you and Fireflies is too high - need to close that gap to move forward
next_steps: Tyler and Levi to review legal requirements

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call with Tyler. Discussed path to $11K pricing. Proposed $11,300 (35% discount) as final offer. Tyler agreed to take it to Levi for final approval. Discussed contract terms, payment terms, and implementation start date.

questions_asked.question: What's included in the implementation support at this price?
questions_asked.answer: Full implementation support, user training, dedicated CSM for 90 days, and ongoing technical support - no reduction in service.

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Levi Desai to finalize terms. Levi approved $11,300 pricing. Discussed contract terms, auto-renewal clause, and expansion options. Levi asked about adding more seats mid-contract if they expand the team. Positive close - ready to move to contracts.

questions_asked.question: Can we add more seats mid-year if we grow the team?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, seats can be added anytime at prorated cost for remainder of contract term.

questions_asked.question: What's the auto-renewal process?
questions_asked.answer: 60-day notice required to cancel, otherwise auto-renews at then-current pricing.

next_steps: Target signature by end of week

touches.ai_summary: Negotiation call with Tyler regarding contract terms. Tyler's legal team requested changes to auto-renewal clause and data privacy terms. Discussed mutual NDA requirements and payment terms (requested Net 45 instead of Net 30).

questions_asked.question: Can we do Net 45 payment terms?
questions_asked.answer: We can accommodate Net 45 for the first year.

objections: Legal wants changes to the auto-renewal language - they prefer opt-in renewal rather than opt-out

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Tyler with revised contract addressing legal comments on auto-renewal (changed to opt-in renewal with 60-day advance notice) and Net 45 payment terms. Tyler confirmed Levi is reviewing final version.

Final pricing and terms confirmation call with Tyler. Reviewed executed contract: 16 seats, $11,300 ACV, unlimited automation tier, Net 45 payment terms, opt-in renewal. Implementation kickoff scheduled for next week. Tyler confirmed Lisa is ready to start and team is excited to get started.

questions_asked.question: Is there anything else you need from us before kickoff?
questions_asked.answer: No, we're all set. Looking forward to getting this implemented.
